MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Madonna Herman, Esq., WILSON, ELSER, MOSKOWITZ,EDELMAN & DICKER LLP, (415) 433-0990 for Defendant, Vizcoin Construction Company Inc.
Sloan Bailey, Esq. (no telephone number and Firm provided) Specially Appearing for Defendant Vizcoin Construction Company Inc.
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 Court reporter,

Mr. Bailey requests persmission to specially appear on behalf of defendant Vizcoin Construction Company Inc., eventhough he has not yet agreed to represent defendant in this case. Mr. Bailey states that he was aksed by the client on Friday to substitute in on this matter, and that he will not agree to substitute in as counsel for defendant if the upcoming trial date of Jul-19-2021 can not be continued. Court states that this court has not jurisdiction as to trial dates.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

DEFENDANT VIZCON CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Denied without prejudice.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
